title: Matt Brewer, former chair of Chicago Housing Authority, running for Chicago mayor

statements.summary: Brewer states he is 'all about affordable housing' and emphasizes ensuring people are not left behind.
statements.quote: I'm all about affordable housing. I'm all about making sure we don't leave people behind.

statements.summary: Brewer highlights housing as central to many issues, referencing his experience running the CHA and conversations about housing.
statements.quote: And whether it's a conversation about housing, housing is at the hub of a lot of different things — the intersection of transportation and public safety, economic mobility, a lot of core issues circulate around housing.
